brand.name: DDP Bookkeeping
brand.positioning: Modern, trustworthy, clean financial branding for bookkeeping and accounting services.

logo.concept: Geometric DDP monogram with a small bar-chart/growth cue integrated into the P.
logo.primary_logo: Horizontal lockup: DDP monogram + vertical divider + DDP Bookkeeping wordmark.
logo.app_icon: Simplified DDP monogram on a full-bleed deep green gradient background.

usage.preferred_background: Deep green gradient or white/light neutral depending on placement.
usage.clear_space: Maintain clear space around the logo equal to at least the height of the small bar-chart mark inside the P.
usage.minimum_size: Keep the horizontal logo large enough that the word Bookkeeping remains readable. Use the standalone icon at small sizes.

deepEvergreen.name: Deep Evergreen
deepEvergreen.role: Primary anchor color; backgrounds, headers, navigation, primary brand surfaces.

forestGreen.name: Forest Green
forestGreen.role: Dark supporting green; gradients, shadows, high-contrast text areas.

emeraldAccent.name: Emerald Accent
emeraldAccent.role: Highlight color; charts, progress indicators, CTAs, active states.

mintHighlight.name: Mint Highlight
mintHighlight.role: Soft accent; success highlights, badges, subtle backgrounds.

white.name: White
white.role: Logo/text on green, clean surfaces, content cards.

charcoalText.name: Charcoal Text
charcoalText.role: Primary body copy on light backgrounds.

primaryGreenBleed.usage: Full-bleed banner, splash, hero, app icon background.

emeraldGlow.usage: Accent graphics, chart highlights, small illustration elements.

primary.usage: Logo-inspired headings, page titles, bold UI labels.

secondary.usage: Body copy, UI text, forms, tables, settings.

optionalAccent.usage: Optional accent labels, small cards, marketing callouts.

typography.fallbackStack: Inter, Montserrat, Manrope, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif

ui_style.iconStyle: Minimal line/filled icons; finance-focused; avoid clutter and overly literal clipart.
ui_style.spacing: Generous whitespace, clean alignment, simple hierarchy.

usage_notes: Use deep green as the anchor brand color.
Use emerald for highlights, charts, and CTAs.
Maintain generous white space and clean alignment.
Use the standalone DDP icon when the wordmark would be too small.
Avoid adding unnecessary financial symbols such as dollar signs unless they serve a clear UI purpose.
